Params: {3: 'In today\'s "Endless Eight Corridor: Caribbean Swimsuit Empire"...'}
{3: 'While this time, Sophia seems to have become Ms. Exposition.'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Sophia', 3: 'Good day. This is the Director++ Explosive Set you ordered.', 4: '1'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Nanami & Sophia', 3: 'Time to pick up where we left off. Let\'s continue the story of swimsuits and battles.', 4: '1', 5: '2'}
{2: 'Nanami', 3: 'Who listens to the theme song more than once?! I\'m skipping it!', 4: '2'}
{3: 'After the long trek of a day and a night, "Lucia" finally arrives...'}
{3: 'Lucia finally arrives at the pantheon known as a "waterpark."'}
{2: '???', 3: '——Who dares disturb the peace afore the gates——'}
{3: 'Before she knew, numerous dark shades have already surrounded "Lucia".'}
{2: 'Lucia', 3: '...You\'re right. I\'ll just fight my way through anyway.', 4: '1'}
{3: '"Lucia" slashes forward, but the blade does not catch anything substantial.'}
{2: '???', 3: 'The truth is... you only have to answer me one question true, \'ere the other side you see.'}
{2: 'Lucia', 3: 'Heh. Easy. I seek to plunder from the guardians all their swimsuits.', 4: '1'}
{2: '???', 3: 'Very honest... I shall grant you a chance to prove yourself...'}
{2: '???', 3: 'Any more than that and it\'s out of my job description... I\'ll be leaving now...'}
{1: '1', 2: '???', 3: '1. The swimsuit will adjudicate this eternal summer.', 4: '1'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Liv', 3: 'Liv, the Lady of the Deep. Responding to the summons.', 4: '1'}
{1: '1', 2: '???', 3: '2. Leave history in the summer sea through the swimsuit.', 4: '1'}
{1: '1', 2: '???', 3: '3. Swimsuits have to make heads turn... No, wait, I mean burn!', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Lucia', 3: 'Good. The whole trinity\'s here, eh? Saves me the effort. Come at me!', 4: '1'}
{3: 'The brink of battle, any moment now——'}
{3: 'But hey, that might be too standard.'}
{3: 'It\'s a story after all. We need to soak it in more creative juices!'}
{3: 'What is it that the guardians saw, that turned them silent?'}
{2: 'Lucia', 3: '...Let\'s ignore the "I am your father" bit first. But there\'s three of you here!', 4: '1'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Liv', 3: 'A-ahem... By child, we don\'t mean you.', 4: '1'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Lee', 3: 'From the looks of it, you must be the wearer of that "swimsuit."', 4: '1'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Karenina', 3: 'Show us your "swimsuit" first. And we\'ll explain.', 4: '1'}
{3: 'Neigh, stuff it! It takes too much effort!'}
{2: 'Lucia', 3: 'I will be the one to end all swimsuits.', 4: '1'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Sophia', 3: 'Do you "have" to say this line every time she henswims?', 4: '1'}
{3: 'Without this line, it doesn\'t cut well into the ads!'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Babylonia Sherlock', 3: 'What one man can invent, another can discover.', 4: '1'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Basketball Player', 3: 'I\'m not passing the ball! They don\'t respect the fairness that serves as the foundation of sport! They\'re all using them new Asimov legs!', 4: '1'}
{3: '——Because only we, can get people of different tastes glued to the same TV screen!'}
{3: '——With our special polarized glasses, many-shows-one-screen is no longer a dream! Couple it with a Bluetooth earpiece for the audio as well!'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Nanami', 3: 'Iunno, found it in a hard drive in some ruins.', 4: '1'}
{3: 'Ah, whatever, I\'m skipping it. The ad didn\'t play for that long anyways.'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Lucia', 3: 'I will be the one to end all swimsuits.', 4: '1'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Leviathan', 3: 'Impossible. I remember nothing of the sort.', 4: '1'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Liv', 3: 'That is only natural. After all, a filthy, thieving rascal stole you from us.', 4: '1'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Lucia', 3: 'Levi, don\'t trust any of their nonsense!', 4: '1'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Lee', 3: 'What are you getting all riled up about? We aren\'t saying you took her from us.', 4: '1'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Karenina', 3: 'Or is it you?! Are you the thief?! Get ready for a beating if you are!', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Leviathan', 3: 'I don\'t have any memories of me being made by someone...', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Leviathan', 3: '...But when I first opened my eyes. It was you that I saw...', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Leviathan', 3: 'So tell me. What happened... on that day?', 4: '1'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Nanami', 3: 'Stop popping out all of a sudden! I\'m ad lib—I mean writing already!', 4: '1'}
{2: '"Lil\' Lucia"', 3: 'Wow, this fake name you came up with is... X-tra lame.', 4: '1'}
{2: '"Lil\' Lucia"', 3: 'My mommy said I shouldn\'t listen to ominous sounding people trying to get you into pyramid schemes.', 4: '1'}
{3: 'Probably something real bad from the Golden Age.'}
{2: 'X', 3: 'N-no, I\'m not trying to sell you travel club licenses...'}
{2: 'X', 3: 'Child, do you know what that swimsuit before you is?'}
{2: 'X', 3: 'That thing, child, is what will protect you in the eternal summer to come.'}
{2: 'X', 3: 'Of course. Everything I say is true.'}
{2: '"Lil\' Lucia"', 3: 'On that day, I meant to just leave that mysterious and ominous voice behind...', 4: '1'}
{2: '"Lil\' Lucia"', 3: 'But the candies he promised were just too many...', 4: '1'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Lucia', 3: 'Stop making me recall such an embarrassing story...', 4: '1'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Leviathan', 3: '...So did you at least get the candies?', 4: '1'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Lucia', 3: 'What do you think I\'m traveling through the worlds for?', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Liv', 3: 'Maybe you should take Leviathan with you?', 4: '1'}
{3: '...Of course, that is if you still want the candies that X promised you.'}
